title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabHotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabHotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
FabHotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
